doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document grossly misstates Illinois law, as a 5-day notice under 735 ILCS 5/9-209 provides a right to cure by payment and requires a court eviction proceeding before a tenant must vacate.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: The document misstates Illinois law—a 5-day notice provides a right to cure by paying rent and requires a court eviction proceeding before a tenant must vacate—indicating this is invented guidance.
